data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimization of choices to improve decision-making speed.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizing button size and placement for easier interaction.
data.technical_spec: Clickable areas designed to reduce pointer movements.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Use of visual grouping to enhance comprehension and visibility.
data.technical_spec: Whitespace, alignment, and proximity in design.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Simplifying content for better memory retention.
data.technical_spec: Breaking information into chunks of 7±2 elements.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Create an aesthetically pleasing interface to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent branding, color schemes, and typography.
